attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
LNK.APPLICATION_NAME,
LNK.IAM_USER_KEY ,
LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
LNK.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
LNK.INTERNAL_ROLE,
LNK.EXTERNAL_ROLE,
LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
LNK.CCO_ID,
LNK.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ,
LNK.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,
LNK.DD_CEC_ID,
LNK.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
LNK.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
LNK.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
LNK.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
LNK.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,
LNK.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
LNK.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE ,
LNK.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
LNK.EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
LNK.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
LNK.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
LNK.DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME ,
LNK.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SALESREP.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUMBER,
CASE WHEN BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ='DR_Agent' THEN  'Y'  WHEN BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME='DR_Territory' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y'  END AM_FLG,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
LNK.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
LNK.EDW_CREATE_USER ,
LNK.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
LNK.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
LNK.START_TV_DT,
LNK.END_TV_DT,
LNK.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
FROM  $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK LNK
LEFT  OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP SALESREP 
ON LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY=SALESREP.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME IN ('DR_Territory', 'DR_Agent') AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR'
AND LNK.APPLICATION_NAME='MBR AM'
AND LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT= (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y') 
AND LNK.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT>=2
UNION ALL
SELECT
APPLICATION_NAME,
IAM_USER_KEY,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
INTERNAL_ROLE,
EXTERNAL_ROLE,
LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
CCO_ID,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,
DD_CEC_ID,
RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
'DR_Agent' BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
SEC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
'COVERAGE'  ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
'S' STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
'E' EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
 TERR.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
'CORP. REVENUE' DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
TERR.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
TERR.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SEC.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,
'Y'  AM_FLG,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
CURRENT_DATE EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_DATE EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT,
BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
FROM  
(SELECT DISTINCT 
APPLICATION_NAME	,
IAM_USER_KEY	,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY	,
BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT	,
INTERNAL_ROLE	,
EXTERNAL_ROLE	,
RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY	,
CCO_ID	,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG	,
DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD	,
DD_CEC_ID	,
RU_EXTERNAL_FLG	,
RU_INTERNAL_FLG	,
RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME	,
RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR	,
' 'STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG	,
' 'EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG	,
IN_LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT	,
DUMMY_USER_ROLE	,
BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD	,
START_TV_DT,
END_TV_DT
FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK IN_LNK INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR  CURR_MTH
ON CURR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=IN_LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND IN_LNK.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT>=2
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM' AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR' AND IN_LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CURR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  )  LNK
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SALES_REP_NUMBER,WORKER.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY PARTY_KEY  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP REP INNER JOIN 
(SELECT RU_SALES_REP_TYPE_CD,CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,ERP_SALES_REP_TYPE,RU_SALES_TERR_TEAM_NAME 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP REP1  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SLS_REP_TEAM_CSCO_WKR_LNK TEAM ON 
REP1.SALES_REP_NUMBER=TEAM.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM ) WORKER 
ON REP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=WORKER.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN TERR_ASGN
ON TERR_ASGN.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME=REP.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD='DR'
WHERE TERR_ASGN.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT>=CURRENT_DATE) SEC
ON SEC.PARTY_KEY=LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY  TERR
ON TERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SEC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
WHERE LNK.APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'
AND LNK.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR'
UNION ALL
SELECT
LNK.APPLICATION_NAME,
LNK.IAM_USER_KEY,
LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
LNK.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
LNK.INTERNAL_ROLE,
LNK.EXTERNAL_ROLE,
LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
LNK.CCO_ID,
LNK.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
LNK.DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,
LNK.DD_CEC_ID,
LNK.RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
LNK.RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
LNK.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
LNK.RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
LNK.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
SEC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
'DR_Agent' ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
'S'  STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
'E' EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
TERR.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
'CORP. REVENUE' DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
TERR.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_BK_SALES_TERR_NAME,
TERR.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
SEC.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,
'Y'  AM_FLG,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
LNK.DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
CURRENT_DATE EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_DATE EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
EDW_CREATE_DTM  START_TV_DT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM  END_TV_DT,
BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
FROM (SELECT  DISTINCT APP.APPLICATION_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY,
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
NIU.BK_CPR_UNIVERSAL_ID_INT,
INTERNAL_ROLE,
EXTERNAL_ROLE,
RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
CCO_ID,
NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
DD_BK_WORKER_TYPE_CD,
DD_CEC_ID,
RU_EXTERNAL_FLG,
RU_INTERNAL_FLG,
RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME,
RU_EXTERNAL_USER_EMAIL_ADDR,
IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
CURR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
DUMMY_USER_ROLE,
NIU.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
NIU.EDW_CREATE_USER,
NIU.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
NIU.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'DR' BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD
FROM 
 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER_ROLE_APP_COMP_MAP URAC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APPC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE  IR,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR CURR_MTH
WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' AND 
URAC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N' AND 
NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'  AND
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY=URAC.IAM_USER_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY=APPC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME=URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
AND  APPLICATION_NAME='MBR AM' AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME='DR_Team'
AND DD_CEC_ID NOT IN 
 (SELECT DD_CEC_ID FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_IAM_SALESBO_SLS_TERR_LINK LNK  WHERE APPLICATION_NAME='MBR AM' 
AND LNK.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR' AND LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CURR_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)) LNK
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SALES_REP_NUMBER,WORKER.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP REP INNER JOIN 
(SELECT RU_SALES_REP_TYPE_CD,CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM,ERP_SALES_REP_TYPE,RU_SALES_TERR_TEAM_NAME 
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP REP1  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SLS_REP_TEAM_CSCO_WKR_LNK TEAM ON 
REP1.SALES_REP_NUMBER=TEAM.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM ) WORKER 
ON REP.SALES_REP_NUMBER=WORKER.BK_TEAM_SALES_REP_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_ASSGN TERR_ASSIGN
ON TERR_ASSIGN.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_NAME=REP.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD='DR'
WHERE TERR_ASSIGN.ASSIGNMENT_END_DT>=CURRENT_DATE) SEC
ON SEC.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY=LNK.RU_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY  TERR
ON TERR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SEC.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
WHERE LNK.APPLICATION_NAME='MBR AM'
AND LNK.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR'
